meaning: n.[希神]埃癸斯托斯(Clytemnestra的情夫)
examples: Why call the murderer of Agamemnon "blameless Aegisthus"?
The wife of Agamemnon who, with the assistance of her lover Aegisthus, murdered him on his return from the Trojan War and was later murdered by her son Orestes.
According to Chrysothemis, Klytaemnestra and Aegisthus are afraid of Elektra, and are planning to lock her up in a tower.
Elektra mourns for her father, and she has suffered abuse at the hands of both her mother and Klytaemnestra's lover, Aegisthus.
